data.title: Dogecoin, Cardano Among Four Iconic Altcoins: Trader Sees 'Pretty Close To An End To This Chop'
data.description:
Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been stuck in a multi-week range, leaving altcoins struggling for momentum. However, traders believe this consolidation phase could be setting the stage for an altseason breakout.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43795227/dogecoin-cardano-among-four-iconic-altcoins-trader-sees-pretty-close-to-an-end-to-this-cho?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Abstract Chain users have been compromised, most likely linked to Cardex app
data.description:
Abstract Chain saw an ongoing, widespread attack of drained wallets. Abstract wallets, which gave a permission to Web3 apps, are getting drained of ETH, with estimates for losses between 9.9 ETH and up to 300 ETH.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/abstract-chain-users-compromised/

data.title: Will Michael Saylor’s ’21 rules of Bitcoin’ reignite investors’ confidence?
data.description:
Michael Saylor shares 21 Bitcoin rules, emphasizing its financial revolution, decentralization, and long-term value.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/will-michael-saylors-21-rules-of-bitcoin-reignite-investors-confidence/

data.title: Why Litecoin Won’t Break Out—Analytics Firm Reveals the Cause
data.description:
The market intelligence platform IntoTheBlock has explained the reason why Litecoin has been stuck inside the $90 to $130 range recently. Litecoin Exchange Netflow Has Followed An Interesting Pattern Recently In a new post on X, the analytics firm IntoTheBlock has discussed about a pattern that the Litecoin Exchange Netflow has shown during the recent phase of consolidation in the asset’s...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/litecoin/litecoin-break-out-analytics-firm-reveals-cause/

data.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy flags profitability risk amid Bitcoin volatility and tax worries
data.description:
Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) faces trouble after stocking a large number of Bitcoins in recent months. Today, in a 10-K filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), it warned of lower profits due to a possible higher tax load. A 10-K filing is an annual financial report that publicly traded businesses must send to the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/strategy-flags-risk-amid-btc-volatility/

data.title: LIBRA memecoin scandal dings Solana’s image, but here’s the real reason why SOL is down
data.description:
Solana price plummets as a drop in onchain activity, declining DApps TVL and looming SOL token unlocks approach.

data.title: $1,200,000,000 in Crypto Sent to FTX Creditors Through Kraken and Bitgo: Arkham
data.description:
Creditors have begun receiving funds from the estate of bankrupt crypto exchange FTX, on-chain data shows. According to a new post on the social media platform X, blockchain analytics firm Arkham spotted the distributions going through Bitgo and US-based crypto exchange Kraken. “FTX USERS RECEIVING FUNDS Users with FTX claims of under $50,000 have started […]
The post $1,200,000,000 in Crypto...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/18/1200000000-in-crypto-sent-to-ftx-creditors-through-kraken-and-bitgo-arkham/

data.title: West Virginia Senator Introduces Bill That Allows State To Invest 10% of Reserves in Digital Assets
data.description:
A West Virginia lawmaker recently introduced a bill that, if passed, would enable the state government to invest up to 10% of public funds into Bitcoin (BTC), stablecoins and/or precious metals. Senate Bill 465 would greenlight the Board of Treasury Investments of West Virginia to invest in crypto assets with market caps of more than […]
The post West Virginia Senator Introduces Bill That...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/18/west-virginia-senator-introduces-bill-that-allows-state-to-invest-10-of-reserves-in-digital-assets/
